normal_bill_en.what_this_is: This looks like an electricity, water, or utility bill.
key_facts: you can pay online or by mail
questions are on your account card
actions: Show this letter to a family member or someone you trust.
Before you pay or reply: contact the company or office through a phone number or website you already know and trust — never use the contact details printed in this letter.

gift_card_scam_en.what_this_is: This looks like a letter from the government or tax office.
reasons: risk of arrest if not paid
pressure to pay quickly
contact bank or tax office
It pushes you to act immediately
It asks for payment by gift card or cryptocurrency
actions: Show this letter to a family member or someone you trust.
Before you pay or reply: contact the company or office through a phone number or website you already know and trust — never use the contact details printed in this letter.

lottery_scam_en.what_this_is: This is a charity letter for a prize. It tells you what to do to claim it
key_facts: to claim, send a fee of $2
reasons: It pushes you to act immediately
It asks for a wire or money transfer
It promises a prize or deal that seems too good to be true
It uses fear or pressure so you do not stop to think
actions: Show this letter to a family member or someone you trust.
Before you pay or reply: contact the company or office through a phone number or website you already know and trust — never use the contact details printed in this letter.

reasons: The sender's name and contact details do not match
actions: Show this letter to a family member or someone you trust.
Before you pay or reply: contact the company or office through a phone number or website you already know and trust — never use the contact details printed in this letter.

gift_card_scam_hi.what_this_is: यह सरकार या टैक्स दफ़्तर की चिट्ठी लगती है।
reasons: arrest threat
no way to contact bank
यह तुरंत कुछ करने का दबाव डालती है
यह गिफ्ट कार्ड या क्रिप्टो से भुगतान माँगती है
actions: यह चिट्ठी परिवार के किसी सदस्य या भरोसेमंद व्यक्ति को दिखाएँ।
पैसे देने या जवाब देने से पहले: उस कंपनी या दफ़्तर से उसी नंबर या वेबसाइट पर बात करें जिसे आप पहले से जानते और भरोसा करते हैं — इस चिट्ठी में छपे नंबर या पते का इस्तेमाल न करें।

gift_card_scam_es.what_this_is: Esto parece una carta del gobierno o de la oficina de impuestos.
key_facts: Qué piden: pay the penalty within a set time
reasons: Le presiona a actuar de inmediato
Amenaza con multas, arresto o cierre de su cuenta
actions: Muestre esta carta a un familiar o a alguien de confianza.
Antes de pagar o responder: contacte a la empresa u oficina por un teléfono o sitio web que usted ya conozca y en el que confíe — nunca use los datos de contacto impresos en esta carta.

gift_card_scam_ja.what_this_is: これは役所や税務署からの手紙のようです。
reasons: risk of arrest
need to pay quickly
contact your bank
今すぐ行動するように急かしています
ギフトカードや暗号資産での支払いを求めています
actions: この手紙を、ご家族や信頼できる人に見せてください。
お金を払う前や返事をする前に:ご自分がもともと知っていて信頼できる電話番号やホームページから、その会社や役所に確かめてください。この手紙に印刷されている連絡先は使わないでください。
